Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json

token = 'sbp_bd00e753fd2b4e99d5a5d3a33a6704c4010ba1fa'
ref   = 'utskycikzhimasfeixcs'

with open\('C:/Users/Lukas/Documents/App/Claudecode/LiquidDemocracyAuroville/supabase/schema_versioned.sql', 'r'\) as f:
    sql = f.read\(\)

payload = json.dumps\({'query': sql}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(
    f'https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/{ref}/database/query',
    data=payload,
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as resp:
        print\('STATUS:', resp.status\)
        print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)[:500]\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\('ERROR:', e.code, e.read\(\).decode\(\)[:500]\)
")

conn = psycopg2.connect\(
    host="db.utskycikzhimasfeixcs.supabase.co",
    port=5432,
    dbname="postgres",
    user="postgres",
    password="LiqDem!Auroville2026#Secure",
    sslmode="require",
    connect_timeout=15
\)

print\("PG:", row[1][:50]\)
conn.close\(\)
PYEOF)
